root_text.sn23.23:1.2: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho āyasmā rādho bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.sn23.23:1.3: “sādhu me, bhante, bhagavā saṅkhittena dhammaṁ desetu, yamahaṁ bhagavato dhammaṁ sutvā eko vūpakaṭṭho appamatto ātāpī pahitatto vihareyyan”ti.
root_text.sn23.23:2.1: “Yo kho, rādha, māro; tatra te chando pahātabbo, rāgo pahātabbo, chandarāgo pahātabbo.
root_text.sn23.23:2.3: Rūpaṁ kho, rādha, māro; tatra te chando pahātabbo, rāgo pahātabbo, chandarāgo pahātabbo.
root_text.sn23.23:2.4: Vedanā māro; tatra te chando pahātabbo …pe…
root_text.sn23.23:2.5: saññā māro; tatra te chando pahātabbo …pe…
root_text.sn23.23:2.6: saṅkhārā māro; tatra te chando pahātabbo …pe…
root_text.sn23.23:2.7: viññāṇaṁ māro; tatra te chando pahātabbo …pe…
root_text.sn23.23:2.8: yo kho, rādha, māro; tatra te chando pahātabbo, rāgo pahātabbo, chandarāgo pahātabbo”ti.
root_text.sn23.24:1.1: “Yo kho, rādha, māradhammo; tatra te chando pahātabbo, rāgo pahātabbo, chandarāgo pahātabbo …pe….
root_text.sn23.33:1.1: “Yo kho, rādha, samudayadhammo; tatra te chando pahātabbo, rāgo pahātabbo, chandarāgo pahātabbo …pe….

translation_text.sn23.23:1.2: Seated to one side, Venerable Rādha said to the Buddha:
translation_text.sn23.23:1.3: “Sir, may the Buddha please teach me Dhamma in brief. When I’ve heard it, I’ll live alone, withdrawn, diligent, keen, and resolute.”
translation_text.sn23.23:2.1: “Rādha, you should give up any desire, any greed, any desire and greed for whatever is Māra.
translation_text.sn23.23:2.3: Form is Māra. You should give up any desire, any greed, any desire and greed for it.
translation_text.sn23.23:2.7: Consciousness is Māra. You should give up any desire, any greed, any desire and greed for it.
translation_text.sn23.23:2.8: You should give up any desire, any greed, any desire and greed for whatever is Māra.”
translation_text.sn23.24:1.1: “You should give up any desire, any greed, any desire and greed for whatever is subject to Māra …”
